creator: peter.schuller@infidyne.com
text:
NOTE: This port should be committed subsequent to ports/125987 (which
updates duplicity), because older versions of duplicity will not work
with newer versions of boto. For this reason I have CC:ed
vd@freebsd.org, the maintainer of sysutils/duplicity.

- Update to 1.3a

Removed file(s):
- files/patch-setup.py
